texto: Tears blurred her vision as she leaned over him. His mouth was surely made for smiling. For laughing. For kissing. Grief welled up along with the feeling that he might never do any of those things again.She closed her eyes and pressed her lips to his. They were cool and unresponsive.Then they parted.She jerked back, saw his eyes flutter open.“Don’t stop now,” he whispered.
explicacao: Citação de Elena Greene sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Tears blurred her vision as she leaned over him. His mouth was surely made for smiling.
